steps.title: Identify the structure of the linear function
steps.content: In $W(x) = 4x + 80$, the term $4x$ depends on the number of plants, while $80$ is a constant that doesn't change with $x$. The constant represents work that takes the same time regardless of plant count.

steps.title: Recognize the constant as mowing time
steps.content: Since the gardener's tasks are watering plants and mowing grass, and mowing takes the same time no matter how many plants there are, the constant $80$ represents mowing time. The answer is 80.
